chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-383 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.or orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 1809/25 3.For hearing of main case 29-05-2025 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. **** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received so far, which reflects that the petitioners and their counsel have lost their interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
